title: catunaregam spinosa
intro: Catunaregam spinosa, also known as the Yellow Myrtle or Yellow Wild Plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Catunaregam spinosa include its use in treating fever, skin diseases, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or paste for various herbal preparations.
